title: Rolson 250mm Aviation Tin Snips
features: Straight cutting tin snips with spring
Fitted with safety catch to keep blades closed when not in use
Also suitable for cutting curves and circular shapes
Compound leverage for extra power; 250mm length
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring you new innovative products, all at the very best possible margins and this year is no different. We bring promotional product combinations that offer originality and a unique sales offering. Description Rolson Tools produces all of its products to an extremely high and diligent standard. All of our products come with the Rolson seal of approval allowing you to feel confident in the fact that your chosen product comes made to international standards, well presented in our branded packaging and extremely well-priced. Rolson Tools always aims to offer the most exciting and innovative products possible, without compromising on our values of quality and safety. Box Contains 1x Tin snip
